hero.title: Melaka Eye Specialist
hero.subtitle: & Refractive Centre
hero.description: An ophthalmology specialist centre that offers a wide range of diagnostic services and treatments for vision-related problems. We provide comprehensive eye examinations, treatment for various eye diseases, and refractive procedures. With a professional approach and modern equipment, the centre aims to help patients improve their vision quality and ensure their eye health remains at its best.

about.title: Melaka Eye Specialist And Refractive Centre
about.history: Melaka Eye Specialist & Refractive Centre (MESRC) is the primary activity of Kayangan Bumi Medical Sdn Bhd (KBMSB), which it was set-up by its founder to provide medical related services. The company was officially registered on December 22, 2009. KBMSB planned for MESRC to be a one-stop centre offering comprehensive medical treatment for eye and visual problems. MESRC became operational in April, 2011.
about.mission:
1.To provide quality and comprehensive medical services for eye treatment and visual rehabilitation.
2.To become the preferred eye treatment and refractive center for the community through appropriate marketing and patient services.
3.To offer 24-hour services that enable patients to recover from treatment as soon as possible.
about.vision: To provide a centre exclusively for patients with eye problems; available at all times; easily accessible to the community; with reasonable fees. It shall provide safe and skilful medical services with high level of efficiency.
about.accreditation: Licensed by Ministry of Health Malaysia, ISO 9001:2015 Certified, Member of Malaysian Medical Association.

accreditationItems.title: Ambulatory Care Centre with Kementerian Kesihatan Malaysia (KKM)
accreditationItems.subtitle: Since 2009

about.title: Melaka Eye Specialist And Refractive Centre
about.history: Established in 2011, Eye Specialist Center started as a small clinic with the goal of providing affordable eye care. Now, after 15 years of service, we have grown into a full-fledged eye specialist hospital equipped with advanced surgical and diagnostic facilities.
about.mission: To provide accessible, high-quality eye care services to all segments of society, utilizing cutting-edge technology and compassionate care.
about.vision: To be the leading eye care provider in the region, known for excellence in patient care, innovation, and community outreach.
about.accreditation: Licensed by Ministry of Health Malaysia, ISO 9001:2015 Certified, Member of Malaysian Medical Association.

doctors.name: Dr. Liyana Zulkifli
doctors.bio: Dr. Liyana specializes in cataract surgery and LASIK procedures with over 12 years of experience.

doctors.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
doctors.bio: Dr. Rajesh is an expert in glaucoma management and neuro-ophthalmology conditions.

doctors.name: Dr. Sarah Mei
doctors.bio: Dr. Sarah specializes in children's eye care and strabismus treatment.

doctors.name: Dr. Imran Shafiq
doctors.bio: Dr. Imran is a retina specialist with expertise in diabetic retinopathy and macular degeneration.

reviews.name: Mohd Fadzil
reviews.text: Very successful Lasik surgery. The treatment from the doctors and nurses was very satisfactory from the first day of consultation until the surgery was completed. My vision is now 20/20 clear!

reviews.name: Siti Aminah
reviews.text: Brought my mother for cataract treatment. The doctor explained the process very clearly and calmed my mother who was initially scared. The process was fast and painless. Thank you Eye Specialist Center.

reviews.name: Ahmad Razak
reviews.text: Professional service and modern equipment. I had a glaucoma screening done here. The doctor was very patient in explaining the condition and treatment options available.

contact.address: Level 5, Specialist Medical Centre, Jalan Medical 1, 50000 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

ceoMessage.message: The first concept of MESRC is to provide excellent medical treatment for the eye, bringing the treatment to the patients and developing MESRC into a one-stop centre. Once fully established, MESRC aims to provide 80-95% of the needed eye treatment. In cases where the patient's condition requires further intervention at other institutions, MESRC will provide appropriate assistance.

services.title: Cataract Surgery
services.description: A procedure to remove a clouded, natural eye lens and replace it with a clear artificial lens (Intraocular Lens or IOL).
services.details:
Remove Cloudy eyes
Day Care Surgery

services.title: IPCL Surgery
services.description: IPCL (Implantable Phakic Contact Lens) surgery is a refractive procedure where a thin, flexible lens is surgically placed inside the eye to correct vision
services.details:
Free from glasess
HD Vision
Day Care Surgery

services.title: Periodic Eye Check Up
services.description: A comprehensive series of tests to evaluate your vision . Suggested a frequent exams if you wear contact lenses, have diabetes, high blood pressure, or a family history of eye disease
services.details:
Visual Acuity
Slit-Lamp Examination
Eye Pressure Test 
Consultation

services.title: Pterygium Surgery
services.description: A procedure to remove a noncancerous, fleshy growth from the surface of the eye.  This growth typically develops due to long-term exposure to UV light, wind, or dust.
services.details:
Remove growth tissues
Day Care Surgery
